content: Cait: Fuckin’ hell, Karlin, ya Institute prick. What’s with all these plants? Ya get off on touchin’ ‘em or somethin’? Bet ya jerk it to photosynthesis data while wearin’ that stupid lab coat. Isaac Karlin: Disgusting. Your vulgarity is matched only by your ignorance. These specimens are the future of the Commonwealth’s food supply. Unlike you, they serve a purpose beyond spreading your legs for caps. Cait: Oh fuck off, ya synth-lovin’ freak. At least I ain’t fuckin’ plants like some of your raider buddies do. Seen ‘em humpin’ mutfruit trees like they’re settlin’ for second best after their momma’s corpse. Isaac Karlin: Your crude observations are as meaningless as your existence. The Institute’s work will outlast your pathetic, chem-addled lifespan. Though I suppose your only contribution is your tight little body for your so-called “protector” to defile. Cait: Hah! MJR fucks me better than any of your lab-coated virgins ever could.

Cait: Keep breathin’ down here with your fuckin’ plants, Karlin. I got a real man waitin’ on me, and he don’t need test tubes to make me scream. Isaac Karlin: How charming. I’ll be sure to catalog your idiocy alongside the rest of the surface’s genetic failures. Enjoy your… .
